photo_library.name: Photo Library
photo_library.description: Scan local photo directories, extract EXIF metadata, and ingest into the timeline

enabled.label: Enable
enabled.description: Turn on photo library sync for the timeline.

source_paths.label: Photo Directories
source_paths.description: Local directories containing photos to scan. Add one or more paths.

exclude_patterns.label: Exclude Patterns
exclude_patterns.description: Glob patterns for directories or files to skip (e.g. thumbnails, .cache).

sync_mode.label: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: How photo library should be synchronized.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: Polling interval used for interval-based sync.

max_items_per_sync.label: Max Items Per Sync
max_items_per_sync.description: Maximum number of photos to process per sync run.

settle_window_hours.label: Session Settle Window (hours)
settle_window_hours.description: How long a burst of continuous shooting must stay quiet before it is treated as a finished session and written to the timeline. Lower values surface results sooner; higher values keep outings grouped more reliably.
